children.text: by application made simultaneously with an application for a motor vehicle driver’s license pursuant to ;section 20504 of this title
by mail application pursuant to ; andsection 20505 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: at the appropriate registration site designated with respect to the residence of the applicant in accordance with State law; and

children.label: B
children.text: at a Federal, State, or nongovernmental office designated under .section 20506 of this title

A State in which, under law that is in effect continuously on and after , there is no voter registration requirement for any voter in the State with respect to an election for Federal office.August 1, 1994

A State in which, under law that is in effect continuously on and after , or that was enacted on or prior to , and by its terms is to come into effect upon the enactment of this chapter, so long as that law remains in effect, all voters in the State may register to vote at the polling place at the time of voting in a general election for Federal office.August 1, 1994August 1, 1994
